meaning: n.减少,缩影,变形,缩减量,约简,缩小,降低,缩图,缩版
examples: There has been some reduction in unemployment.
This represents a reduction of 5% in real terms.
The company has made heroic efforts at cost reduction.
However, that reduction, as well as others in the 2003 tax bill, expires in 2010.
Democrats have been howling for months over the proposed reduction for the SBA budget, with Sen.
